programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Hahai I Na Pilikua Nui
programme.desc: The Five-0 must once again engage in the twisted mind games of serial killer Dr. Madison Gray when she arrives at the HPD covered in blood that matches Alicia Brown's.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: E Malama Pono
programme.desc: After tracking down the missing uranium, which has been used to build a bomb in the middle of the jungle, McGarrett and Danny must move the explosive material through treacherous terrain before it detonates.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Puka 'Ana
programme.desc: McGarrett and Kono suspect that an abused young girl may be the victim of a sex trafficking ring on the Island; Chin and Grover investigate a murder at a sober living facility.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Huikau Nā Makau a na Lawai'a
programme.desc: The Five-0 helps a private investigator in the case of a kidnapped woman whose husband may have something to hide; Rachel tells Danny that she is getting a divorce from Stan.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Ua Malo'o Ka Wai
programme.desc: McGarrett and the Five-0 are captured while tracking a dangerous nemesis to the island of Lanai; Grover takes his son to Chicago, where he testifies against a dirty cop.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.sub-title: Waimaka 'Ele'Ele
programme.desc: McGarrett works the murder case of one of the last survivors of the USS Arizona; Adam uncovers bone fragments at his new construction job.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: Team Scorpion tries to help a father and his daughter when their plane crashes nearby; Paige helps Walter navigate his feelings about Cabe's possible future in prison.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: The team anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison; they use their nervous energy to try saving a dog stuck in a cistern.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Walter becomes unconscious after falling down the stairs and enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: The team must work with Toby's nemesis and his wife -- Toby's ex-fiancée -- when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them; Walter is distracted by a dream in which he married Florence instead of Paige.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: In the Blood
programme.desc: Pride's father, Cassius Pride, is wrapped up in an NCIS case involving a notorious unsolved casino heist; Pride meets a family member he never knew existed.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Pound of Flesh
programme.desc: After Pride's assistant escapes from a kidnapper, the team uncovers evidence of a suspect who is harvesting organs from multiple victims; Pride turns to a friend for guidance as he struggles with the ramifications of his recent brush with death.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Sheepdogs
programme.desc: Following a deadly car explosion in the French Quarter, the team interrogates a professor and former member of a student protest organization; Tammy discovers a secret about Hannah's personal life.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Close to Home
programme.desc: The team places Mateo Diaz, a high school gang member turned informant, in protective custody while they investigate the murder of his junior reserve officers' training corps instructor; Pride needs his brother's help to gain Mateo's trust.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Risk Assessment
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Navy contractor who secretly lived two lives for decades.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Tick Tock
programme.desc: Pride is given a series of tasks to complete by unknown assailants who are holding Wade and his father hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Vindicta
programme.desc: Pride and the team hope to take down a secret and lethal group of former intelligence agents and avenge the death of someone close to them.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Desperate Navy Wives

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: X
programme.desc: NCIS investigates the disappearance of a Navy entomologist after a deadly shooting at a research lab; the team finds that a rare and deadly virus was stolen.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Conspiracy Theories
programme.desc: Pride and the team reunite with conspiracy journalist Oliver Crane after the source for his latest story is murdered; Hannah's former partner, Liam Somers, surprises her and shares a shocking revelation about an old case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Crab Mentality
programme.desc: The team investigates multiple murders tied to a construction company that creates an experimental chemical that strengthens sea walls; evidence from Hannah's previous mission in Oman is used against her.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Survivor
programme.desc: After an elusive terrorist with a personal vendetta against Hannah resurfaces, she and her family are placed in protective custody while the team searches for the suspect.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Reckoning
programme.desc: After a reshuffling of assignments, Pride returns to the New Orleans office during the investigation of a missing petty officer.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the murder of Patton's friend, a former Navy SEAL gunned down in a drive-by shooting while Patton watched.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: A House Divided
programme.desc: A Navy lieutenant from a well-connected and affluent family has a fatal fall down a flight of stairs at a charity gala; the team investigates whether his death was an accident or foul play.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Jackpot
programme.desc: When Elvis Bertrand's "daughter" is linked to a murder case, he asks Pride to prove her innocence.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: Chaos Theory
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates a deadly bombing at a military museum event with over 1,000 people in attendance.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The River Styx, Part 1

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.sub-title: The River Styx, Part II
programme.desc: After tracking Apollyon, a deadly underground spy network, to war-torn South Ossetia, Pride is separated from the team and faces grave danger; in order to save Pride, the NCIS team must locate a mole who continues to feed information to Apollyon.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: Power is knocked out in Los Angeles, and the team must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without any radio contact; Walter must look after a group of Ralph's classmates; Cabe tries to tell Allie that he loves her.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility; Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancee retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Nerd, Wind and Fire

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.sub-title: Dumbster Fire

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: A hitchhiker gets arrested after a biker dies in a fight over a prostitute. In prison, he joins the boxing team to gain dominance and secure early parole from the toughest gang.

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of the President
programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.title: Triumph Of The Ten Gladiators
programme.desc: Ten of the finest gladiators are sent to rescue their kidnapped queen from her traitorous prime minister.

programme.title: The Street Fighter
programme.desc: Fast-paced martial arts action finds freelance fighter Terry Tsuguri (Chiba) hired to spring a convicted killer from prison. But after he succeeds, his employers renege on their payment.

programme.title: Alice, Sweet Alice
programme.desc: What's going on at that strange house at the end of the street, and why are little Alices' family members disappearing? Could Alice have anything to do with this? Noteworthy as Brooke Shields feature Debut.Genre:.

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition's fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! programme.title: TOP CHEF S17
programme.desc: This week the chefs honor the late, great Pulitzer-Prize winning food critic Jonathan Gold. Using Gold's last guide list, the chefs fan out all over Los Angeles to sample the unique taquerias, food trucks, mom-and-pop cafes, upscale eateries and ethnic cuisine only found in the City of Angels. Drawing inspiration from this one-in-a-lifetime culinary odyssey, the chefs create dishes to serve 200 of Jonathan Gold's friends, family, and restaurateurs that he loved at the iconic Union Station. programme.title: CLASS OF 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.
